checks.name: local_health_only
checks.description: Health checks inspect local records and generated reports only.

checks.name: no_provider_rag
checks.description: Health checks cannot call providers or live RAG.

checks.name: no_mutation_apply
checks.description: Health checks cannot mutate canon, memory records, or repair state.

checks.name: no_vector_dependency
checks.description: Health checks do not require vector databases.

checks.name: node2_boundary_enforced
checks.description: Node2 remains surface-only and raw reveal access stays zero.
